mapper.update: UPDATE FINANCIAL_META_VERSION SET items_json_path = #{itemsJsonPath}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE version_id = #{versionId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE FINANCIAL_META_VERSION SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE version_id = #{versionId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM FINANCIAL_META_VERSION WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY approved_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
